title: EditOutput
description: NDJSON output for a surgical edit operation.

bytes_after.description: File size in bytes after editing.

bytes_before.description: File size in bytes before editing.

fuzzy.description: Whether fuzzy matching was used (only present in --old/--new mode).

mtime_preserved.description:
Whether the original modification time was preserved (true) or updated to now (false).
Critical for build systems: false ensures cargo/make/cmake detect the change.

pair_results.description: Per-pair match results (multi-pair mode only) — the per-item ground truth.

pairs_total.description: Total number of `--old`/`--new` pairs requested (multi-pair mode only).

similarity.description: Similarity score of the fuzzy match, 0.0-1.0 (only present for `block_anchor` strategy).

strategies_tried.description: Number of strategies tried before success (only present in --old/--new mode).

strategy.description: Fuzzy strategy that succeeded (only present when fuzzy=true).

PairResult.description:
Outcome of matching a single `--old`/`--new` pair in multi-pair edit mode.

Emitted in `pair_results` on both success and error envelopes so agents
can verify each pair objectively without re-running the edit (G117).
In the default all-or-nothing mode, pairs after the first failure are
never attempted and are absent from the array.

index.description: 1-based position of the pair in the `--old`/`--new` invocation order.

matched.description: Whether the pair matched and was applied to the content.

similarity.description: Similarity score of the fuzzy match, 0.0-1.0 (block-anchor and context-aware only).
